result.markdown: --- title: "Week 4: The forecaster's toolbox" --- ::: {.cell} ::: ## What you will learn this week * Forecasting workflow * Four benchmark forecasting methods that we will use for comparison * Linear trends, dummy seasonality * Fitted values, residuals * Forecasting using transformations * Forecasting with decompositions * Forecast evaluation ## Pre-seminar activities * Read [Chapter 5 of the textbook](https://otexts.com/fpp3/toolbox.html) and watch all embedded videos * Read [Chapter 7.4 of the textbook](https://otexts.com/fpp3/useful-predictors.html) and watch the embedded video. Ignore Fourier series for the moment. ## Tutorial exercises (in class or on your own) * Complete Exercises 1, 3, 5, 11 from [Section 5.11 of the book](https://otexts.com/fpp3/toolbox-exercises.html). * Complete Exercise 2 from [Section 7.10 of the book](https://otexts.com/fpp3/regression-exercises.html). * [Tutorial learning objectives](tute-lo.qmd). ## Assignments * [GA1](../assignments/G1.qmd) is due on Tuesday 24 March. * [IA2](../assignments/A2.qmd) is due on Thursday 02 April. * [GA2](../assignments/G2.qmd) is due on Tuesday 14 April. ## Weekly quiz * [Week 4 quiz](https://learning.monash.edu/mod/quiz/view.php?id=3868) is due on Wednesday 25 March.
